flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Clarkson College fell 39% between 2021 and 2024 (60.0% → 36.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Clarkson College fell 35% between 2021 and 2024 (71.9% → 46.7%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Clarkson College are 19% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($64.9k vs $54.3k).
